creator: portmaster@bsdforge.com
text:
(In reply to Zsolt Udvari from comment #7)
FYI this isn't my port (I'm not the Maintainer).
I only provided this patch because I use the port, and when I
built it. I discovered the missing entries. The other items
you just listed are pulled in through the USE_GNOME array. So
aren't required in the LIB_DEPENDS array.
